entity.summary: Finland-based peer-to-peer Bitcoin trading marketplace founded in 2012. LocalBitcoins announced a staged shutdown in February 2023, suspended new trading on 2023-02-16, and left only withdrawal access afterward.
entity.notes: Modeled as an exchange-service record despite its peer-to-peer marketplace structure because HEI currently uses the exchange entity layer for crypto trading venues. Death date follows the official schedule date when trading and normal wallet services were suspended; later login access for withdrawals is not treated as continued exchange operation. The 2025 Finnish FIN-FSA penalty is post-closure regulatory context and is not used as the death_reason.

events.title: LocalBitcoins founded as a P2P Bitcoin marketplace
events.description: LocalBitcoins was founded in Finland in 2012 and operated as a peer-to-peer marketplace for Bitcoin trading between users.
events.notes: Date is month-level. Stored as 2012-06-01 for schema consistency.

events.title: LocalBitcoins announced service discontinuation
events.description: LocalBitcoins announced a staged discontinuation schedule, starting with suspension of new signups on 2023-02-09 and a planned trading suspension on 2023-02-16.
events.notes: Used as the operator-announced shutdown marker.

events.title: LocalBitcoins suspended trading
events.description: LocalBitcoins suspended trading and normal wallet use on 2023-02-16. After 2023-02-17, customers could only log in to withdraw remaining bitcoin balances.
events.notes: Used as the terminal exchange-service marker because trading was suspended and the site became withdrawal-only afterward.

evidence.title: LocalBitcoins background reference
evidence.notes: Used only for basic background, founding month, founder, Helsinki / Finland origin, and P2P exchange-marketplace identity.

evidence.title: LocalBitcoins has been closed
evidence.notes: Primary source for the staged shutdown schedule, including suspension of new signups on 2023-02-09 and suspension of trading on 2023-02-16.

evidence.title: LocalBitcoins has been closed
evidence.notes: Primary source for using 2023-02-16 as the terminal exchange-service date, because trading and normal wallet use were suspended on that date and only withdrawal login remained afterward.

evidence.title: About LocalBitcoins
evidence.notes: Current official about page states that LocalBitcoins has been closed and identifies LocalBitcoins Oy with a Helsinki, Finland mailing address and Finnish trade-register details.

evidence.title: LocalBitcoins original domain archive
evidence.notes: Archive-first access for preserving the original LocalBitcoins domain as historical evidence.
